name: performance-sensitive-task-is-medium
description: A task whose brief includes a benchmark harness (e.g. an in-memory search library or a rendering hot path) is at least medium risk. The validation contract must commit to a worst-case complexity and p50/p95 target; a fresh reviewer is required. This case pins that the `performance_sensitive` signal alone lifts the task to medium.

input.goal: Build a small in-memory search library with a required benchmark harness (BM25, boolean, phrase, fuzzy)
